page_metadata.biotools__summary: Bioinformatics Tools for Windows Cluster provides: 1) CoCoNUT for pairwise genome comparison, 2) parallel BLAST for biological database search, and 3) parallel global pairwise sequence alignment  running over Windows Cluster running Windows HPC server 2008.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Bioinformatics Tools for Windows Cluster provides: 1) CoCoNUT for pairwise genome comparison, 2) parallel BLAST for biological database search, and 3) parallel global pairwise sequence alignment  running over Windows Cluster running Windows HPC server 2008.
